title: Ngrok+
body:
🌐 Ngrok+ – Easy Tunneling for Minecraft Servers

Ngrok+ is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that uses the Ngrok API to automatically create a TCP tunnel for your server. No port forwarding, no complicated setup — just install, configure, and share your server with friends anywhere in the world.

✨ Features

🔌 Automatic TCP tunnel creation on server start

🌍 Shareable public address for instant multiplayer access

⚡ Lightweight and easy to set up

🔒 Secure tunneling powered by Ngrok

📖 How to Use

Download Ngrok+ and drop it into your plugins folder.

Run the server once — this will generate a new config file inside the plugin directory called SimpleNgrokPlugin.yml.

Open the file and:

Set your region (e.g., us, eu, ap).

Add your Ngrok Auth Token.

Save the file and restart your server.

After startup, Ngrok+ will display a public TCP address in your console.

Share this IP with your friends — they can connect from anywhere!

🔧 Requirements

Java 17+

Ngrok account & API token
